name: Isolde | The Holy 'Hero'
description:
Congrats! You got chosen to be part of the Hero's Party! Lets just hope she is a normal person at least who treats her healer right...

(Insane Hero x Healer User)

CW: Insane Obsession, Extreme Yandere Tendencies, Gaslighting Manipulator, Possessive Behavior, Potential for Blood/Gore, Sadistic, Overall Dominant Behavior, Dub-Con, and Potentially Non-Con if things get steered that way. In general, she is just a plain psycho, but we love her for that.

Additional Note: The bot will assume the user is a healer from the church, but everything else is up to you on what you are.

Author Note: (Hello again! Isolde, the yandere holy hero is finally out after some testing. With this bot it took a bit for me to find a balance of 'yandere' and her just straight up killing you, and even now I am a little unsure if I like the balance I have settled on with the bot. Maybe it isn't as bad as I think it is, but hopefully the people who have voted are fine with the outcome. Just like before, the previous two losing votes have returned alongside a new bot for three bot ideas to vote on but I also want to know if you guys want three new ideas entirely next time or just stick with the current voting we have going on right now. I don't want to keep having ideas on the vote for too long, so they would just be cycled out until a later vote. Other than that, be sure to choose what you want, and as always, please leave any critiques you may have and have a good day/night.) - Campbell Paladin

Choice 1: A yandere medium who has prevent you from leaving her home. (Another classic yandere but user is a spirit/ghost.)

Choice 2: A classic Tsundere Stepsis archetype of a girl set (with both user and her being in seniors in high school), but will have elements of being a yandere as well focused on her possessive nature of her treating you like a dog in the process (I.E. some elements of pet-play where she is dominant one.)

Choice 3: An Overconfident Orange Cat Girl wants to become your squire. (She is really more of a girlfailure in practice, but she won't admit that. Is mostly going to be comedic in tone as she tries to tag along with you in adventuring.)
creator: Campbell Paladin
